codeReview.summary: The commit narrowly updates floating-point cost assertions in MultiSourceReconciliationTests to use accuracy: 1e-9 for cost-delta checks, which directly satisfies the feature goal of eliminating false failures from binary floating-point artifacts while preserving strict reconciliation semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, but the transcript skeleton and handoff verification do not include evidence of reading all required context files specified by token-accounting-worker (mission.md, AGENTS.md, .factory/library/architecture.md, .factory/library/user-testing.md).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 0ecd77cb-ad4c-4e7c-a1f0-0db5bbd785bc shows reads of validation-contract.md and MultiSourceReconciliationTests.swift only; handoff verification.commandsRun contains only test commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library architecture/environment docs appear out of sync with this mission and can mislead workers: they describe an account-switcher mission instead of token-accounting/indexing hardening.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md starts with 'Build a native BurnBar multi-account switcher'; .factory/library/environment.md has '## Account Switcher Mission Notes' and reserved helper ports 8310-8339, while mission AGENTS.md specifies token-accounting scope and temporary helper ports 3190-3199.

summary: Reviewed feature m4-fix-multisource-cost-precision-assertions and found the implementation correct and appropriately scoped. No blocking or non-blocking code defects were identified in the commit diff. Recorded shared-state observations for skill-procedure evidence mismatch and mission-library documentation drift.
